assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)

assertion_results.evidence: Line 34: '## Code Intelligence' and line 35: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: Line 41: '### Limitations' appears after '## Code Intelligence' on line 34, correctly nested as a subsection

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: Line 14 under '## MCP Tools Discovery': 'Found: Two Serena instances — `serena_backend` and `serena_ui`'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: The '## Added' section lists all Project Configuration sections as newly added. The '## Preserved (unchanged)' section only lists original non-config content (title, description, docs, getting started). No prior Project Configuration entries existed to preserve.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Line 20: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exact column match to the template structure

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 8 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 34: 'User declined security triage configuration — section not included in output'. changes-log.md line 21: '## Security Configuration — user declined opt-in; section omitted'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section.
